Name: Average time from Awaiting Assignment to Batch to Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Total time between Awaiting Assignment to Batch and First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Minimum time it takes Awaiting Assignment to Batch to be followed by Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Average time for Awaiting Assignment to Batch when preceded by First Look-Your updates are overdue
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look-Your updates are overdue' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Total resolution time of Awaiting Assignment to Batch in variants that include SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and the end of case where activity 'SW-EIC Accept occurs

Name: Elapsed time between Awaiting Assignment to Batch and the final Manuscript Export Succeeded in the variant ending with Manuscript Export Succeeded after RW-EIC Accept
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Average waiting time to the Awaiting Assignment to Batch after First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Minimum time between First Look-Your updates are due in one week and Awaiting Assignment to Batch
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'First Look-Your updates are due in one week' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Total time it takes Awaiting Assignment to Batch to occur after First Look-Please submit updates in cases that reach RW-EIC Accept
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look-Please submit updates' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Time of Awaiting Assignment to Batch relative to the start of the revised submission phase (i.e., after Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Average time from Awaiting Assignment to Batch to the end of the process (last event in each variant containing Awaiting Assignment to Batch)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Awaiting Assignment to Batch and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time for Awaiting Assignment to Batch in variants that originated from SW-EIC Major Revision versus those from SW-EIC Minor Revision
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Total time between Awaiting Assignment to Batch and the subsequent Manuscript Export Succeeded in the production handoff stage
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Time from the last reviewer decision (e.g., RW-Awaiting EIC Decision) to Awaiting Assignment to Batch
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'RW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Time from Awaiting Assignment to Batch to the next occurrence of Manuscript Export Succeeded, grouped by case:concept:name
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'", 'end': "activity == 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'", 'aggregation': 'average', 'group_by': 'case:concept:name'}"
